requirements.task_name: Estimate the cost of a standard uncontested divorce in California under $2,000
requirements.task_description: Use the Family Law section and fee calculator to find the estimated cost for a standard uncontested divorce in California with no minor children and no contested property, ensuring the maximum budget entered is $2,000.

requirements.task_name: Book a free 20-minute phone consultation with an employment lawyer under $250/hour
requirements.task_description: Use the consultation booking system to schedule a free 20-minute phone consultation with an employment lawyer who has at least a 4.5-star rating and a maximum hourly rate of $250, choosing the earliest available Monday time slot between 10:00 AM and 12:00 PM.

requirements.task_name: Compare the first two business lawyers in Chicago and save the more experienced one
requirements.task_description: Find business lawyers in the Chicago office, compare the first two profiles in the list by years of experience, and add the lawyer with more years of experience (and an hourly rate shown on their profile) to your shortlist.

requirements.task_name: Find and save a recent article on non-compete agreements in Employment Law
requirements.task_description: Locate an article about non-compete agreements in the Employment Law topic that was published within the last 12 months and add it to your saved articles or reading list.

requirements.task_name: Build an estate planning package with three specific documents that stays at or below $1,000
requirements.task_description: Create a customized estate planning package that includes a Last Will, a Durable Power of Attorney, and an Advance Healthcare Directive for an individual in Texas, adjusting options if necessary so that the total package price shown does not exceed $1,000, then proceed to the package summary page.

requirements.task_name: Submit a contact inquiry for a New York tenant with a $3,500 landlord-tenant dispute
requirements.task_description: Use the contact form to submit a landlord-tenant dispute inquiry as a tenant in New York with a dispute amount of $3,500, specifying email as the preferred contact method and including a short description of the issue.

requirements.task_name: Find the nearest office within 10 miles of ZIP 94103 that is open on weekends and view directions
requirements.task_description: Use the office locator to find an office within 10 miles of ZIP code 94103 that has weekend hours, select the nearest one, and open its directions page.

requirements.task_name: Generate a preview of a mutual NDA using the online document generator
requirements.task_description: Use the NDA generator tool to create a mutual non-disclosure agreement between BrightApps LLC and DataCore Inc., governed by California law with a 3-year term, including a non-solicitation clause, and generate the document preview.
